no_overlap_assertion: This kernel does not claim truth owned by Chemistry, Assembly, Specification, Scope, or Taxonomy kernels.
mandatory_assertions: Taxonomy kernel does not own material truth
Material DNA kernel does not own UI navigation surfaces
No execution system may mutate this kernel
Observational intelligence may not mutate this kernel
Projections are derived, not primary truth
admission_requirements: Must define material identity with manufacturer provenance
Must include at least one property class
Must declare compatibility stance or mark as UNKNOWN
lineage_policy: Version provenance mandatory. Spec sheet origin required.
projection_policy: Read-only projections to taxonomy, atlas, and application surfaces.
